ns1:SendMessage.ns1:request: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <TransferMessage xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"> <Header><EnforcementAgentType><EnforcementAgentRegNum>892</EnforcementAgentRegNum><EnforcementAgentName>Христо Василев Георгиев</EnforcementAgentName></EnforcementAgentType><TransferDate>2024-06-06T11:34:13+03:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>{8feac22f-4ce1-438a-a63a-7ace8399eca4}</TransferGUID></Header><Body><TransferData><IncomingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><OutgoingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><CasesReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><ActionReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2024-05-02T00:00:01+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>1</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20248920400138</CaseNum><CaseDate>2024-02-22</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>Любослава Любенова Станчева</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>ПДИ НЕ Е ВРЪЧЕНО ДЛЪЖНИКА НЕ ЖИВЕЕ НА АДРЕСИТЕ ОТ ДЪЛГО ВРЕМЕ ИЗВЪН СТРАНАТА Е</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails></ActionReg></TransferData></Body></TransferMessage>
